name: Prisma AIRS Security
description: AI Runtime Security - scan messages, responses, and tool calls via Palo Alto Networks AIRS

api_key.description: Prisma AIRS API key from Strata Cloud Manager

profile_name.description: AIRS security profile name from Strata Cloud Manager

app_name.description: Application identifier sent with scan requests

fail_closed.description: Block messages when AIRS API is unreachable

dlp_mask_only.description: Mask DLP violations instead of blocking

inbound_scanning.description: Scan and enforce policy on user messages

outbound_scanning.description: Scan assistant responses for data leakage and policy violations

security_context.description: Inject security reminders and threat warnings into agent context

llm_audit.description: Deep scan all LLM prompts and responses (expensive, for compliance)
